title: Making Decisions - If Statements
description: Learn to make your code choose different paths based on conditions using if statements.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Now we use booleans to make decisions! The 'if' statement runs code only when a condition is True.

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So the code inside only runs sometimes?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! Write an if statement with a condition. The action below only happens if the condition is True. Don't forget the colon!

objectives.description: Write an if statement: if condition:
Include a condition with a colon

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Great! Remember: the colon after the condition and indentation for the code block are required!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: The code inside the if block (indented) only runs when the condition is True. Add an action under your if statement.

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: Indentation shows what's inside the if block, like with functions?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! Python uses indentation to define code blocks.

objectives.description: Add indented code inside your if statement

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Perfect! Now your code makes decisions based on conditions.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Let's apply this! Create an if statement: only harvest if the crop is grown. Use an appropriate condition.

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So I can prevent harvesting unready crops?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! Conditionals let your code adapt to different situations.

objectives.description: Create an if statement controlling a farming action

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: My code now makes intelligent decisions!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Perfect! Conditionals make programs dynamic and responsive.

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: But what if you want an alternative action when the condition is False? That's where 'else' comes in!

rewards.description: Unlocked quest: Alternative Paths - Else and Elif
